# INativeUiHost interface

Plugin-facing service for injecting declarative mod uGUI into curated game-UI anchors. The framework builds, styles, and lifecycle-manages the real uGUI; plugins only describe intent via [`NativeUiElementSpec`](./NativeUiElementSpec.md).

```csharp
public interface INativeUiHost
```

## Members

| name | description |
| --- | --- |
| [Register](INativeUiHost/Register.md)(…) | Register an element. Injected when its anchor is present; returns a handle to manage it. |
